## Version

```
capfence --version
```

## Python Version

```
python --version
```

## Operating System

- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Framework

- [ ] LangChain
- [ ] CrewAI
- [ ] LangGraph
- [ ] OpenAI Agents SDK
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Direct Gate (no framework)
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Minimal reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Install capfence version X
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

Or provide a minimal Python script:

```python
# Minimal reproduction script
```

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error messages, stack traces, and logs.

```
Paste error output here
```

## Audit log excerpt (if relevant)

If the bug involves gate decisions, audit logging, or tamper detection, include a sanitized excerpt:

```
Paste audit log rows here (remove sensitive payload data)
```

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here — deployment environment (air-gapped, cloud, local), CI/CD pipeline details, or custom taxonomies in use.
